overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rain-soaked suburban neighborhood at night in a video game environment. The camera moves steadily along wet sidewalks as vehicles drive past on the glistening streets, illuminated by street lamps and the warm glow of house windows through the downpour.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk during a heavy downpour, observing the rain-slicked street

entered.detail: rain-soaked asphalt street reflecting street lights and house windows
wet concrete pavement with puddles and rain droplets visible
tall palm trees lining the left side of the residential street
tall street lamp post casting yellow-orange light through the rain
suburban house with illuminated windows visible through the trees
concrete curb with red and white reflective markers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, rain-soaked suburban street at night. The camera walks along a wet concrete sidewalk bordered by a curb with reflective markers. Palm trees line the left side of the street while a residential house with glowing windows sits in the distance, partially obscured by the downpour.

events.description: red sedan drives past on the wet road from left to right, splashing through puddles

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the sidewalk as a sedan passes by on the rain-slicked street ahead

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving past with headlights on, creating spray from the wet pavement

entered.detail: red four-door sedan with brake lights illuminated, driving through the rain
mature deciduous tree with thick trunk on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues walking, a red sedan passes by on the left, its headlights cutting through the rain. The residential house fades behind as the camera passes a large tree on the right. The street lamps and palm trees move closer as the walk progresses down the wet suburban road.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban sidewalk with brick perimeter wall

events.description: red pickup truck passes by closely on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking past the large tree as a pickup truck drives by, approaching a walled section of the neighborhood

notable_agents.action: red pickup truck passing by closely on the road with visible driver

entered.detail: red pickup truck with headlights on, driving past the camera position
tall red brick perimeter wall running along the right side of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, a red pickup truck passes closely on the left while the camera walks alongside a large tree. A brick perimeter wall comes into view on the right, indicating a transition to a more enclosed section of the neighborhood. The rain continues to fall steadily on the wet pavement as the walk proceeds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rain-soaked suburban street that transitions from an open residential stretch to a more enclosed neighborhood corridor. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, moving toward a distant house with glowing windows partially obscured by the downpour. As the camera progresses, a red sedan passes on the left with headlights cutting through the rain, while the residential house fades behind a large tree on the right. The scene then shifts as a red pickup truck passes closely by, and the open street gives way to a brick perimeter wall appearing on the right. Finally, the camera continues its steady pace along the glistening pavement as the rain falls consistently over the darkening suburban landscape.
